summary: Iteration 102 - 7 Surgical Landing Page Enhancements for KOLOR Studio. All 24 tests passed (100% success rate). All 7 enhancements verified: hero perspective tilt, third ambient glow, stagger-children animations, workflow connector lines, star ratings + verified label on featured testimonial, FAQ accordion (8 questions), and dot grid texture on final CTA.
critical_code_review_comments: Enhancement 1 (Hero perspective tilt): .hero-frame-tilt class correctly applies CSS 3D transforms on desktop (rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-1.5deg)) and disables on mobile via media query
Enhancement 2 (Third ambient glow): Hero section has 3 ambient glow divs - purple at top, orange at left, and purple at bottom-center
Enhancement 3 (Stagger animations): .stagger-children class correctly applied to Problem section pain cards, Features card grid, Testimonials grid, and Workflow steps grid
Enhancement 4 (Workflow connector lines): 2 connector lines with .workflow-connector-line class have scaleX animation triggered on reveal
Enhancement 5 (Star ratings): Featured testimonial (Sophie L.) has 5 amber SVG stars (fill=#E8891A) and 'Verified KOLOR user' label; non-featured testimonials correctly omit these
Enhancement 6 (FAQ accordion): 8 FAQ questions with proper accordion behavior - only one answer open at a time, clicking open question collapses it
Enhancement 7 (Dot grid texture): Final CTA section has radial-gradient background and mask-image for gradient fade at edges
All animations correctly wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) queries for accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 102 complete. All 7 landing page enhancements verified working. Key test IDs: hero-section, faq-section, faq-item-0 through faq-item-7, faq-toggle-0 through faq-toggle-7, final-cta-section, feature-cards, testimonials-section, workflow-section. FAQ accordion uses useState with only one item open at a time. Mobile viewport correctly disables hero-frame-tilt transform.

Landing_Page_Loads.details: Landing page loads without errors, hero-section found

Hero_Frame_Tilt_Class.details: Hero browser chrome frame has .hero-frame-tilt class for perspective tilt

Hero_Three_Ambient_Glows.details: Hero has 3 ambient glow divs (purple top, orange left, purple bottom-center)

Problem_Section_Stagger.details: Problem section pain cards have stagger-children class

Features_Section_Stagger.details: Features section card grid has stagger-children class

Workflow_Section_Stagger.details: Workflow steps grid has stagger-children class

Workflow_Connector_Lines.details: Workflow section has 2 connector lines with workflow-connector-line class

Featured_Testimonial_Stars.details: Featured testimonial (Sophie L.) has 5 amber star SVGs (fill=#E8891A)

Featured_Testimonial_Verified_Label.details: Featured testimonial has 'Verified KOLOR user' label

Non_Featured_No_Stars_Verified.details: Non-featured testimonials do NOT have stars or verified label

FAQ_Section_Labels.details: FAQ has 'Answers' label and 'Everything you need to know.' headline

FAQ_Accordion_Expand.details: Clicking FAQ question expands its answer

FAQ_Accordion_Collapse_Previous.details: Clicking another question collapses the first and expands the second

FAQ_Accordion_Toggle_Close.details: Clicking an open question collapses it

FAQ_Content_Correct.details: FAQ answers contain correct content (free for first 20, three industries, legally binding)

Final_CTA_Dot_Grid.details: Final CTA section has dot grid background texture (radial-gradient)

Final_CTA_Mask_Image.details: Final CTA section has mask-image for gradient fade at edges

Animations_Reduced_Motion.details: Code review confirms animations wrapped in prefers-reduced-motion media queries

Landing_Nav_Functional.details: Landing page nav (KOLOR logo, Features, Pricing, Log in, Start free) is present

All_Sections_Render.details: All existing landing page sections render correctly (hero, problem, features, testimonials, faq, urgency, finalCta, footer)

Mobile_No_Tilt_Transform.details: Mobile viewport: hero-frame-tilt has no transform (transform=none)
